amendment.description: To create a point of order against legislation that would not decrease home electricity bills.

action.text: Amendment SA 5001 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5001, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 50. Record Vote Number: 98.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5001.
Amendment SA 5001 proposed by Senator Markey. To create a point of order against legislation that would not decrease home electricity bills.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5001, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 50. Record Vote Number: 98.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5001 proposed by Senator Markey.
